notes.title: NWS API Spec
notes.summary: Defines the NWS endpoints and fields needed to anchor official settlement-aware weather workflows.

notes.title: Open-Meteo Ensemble API
notes.summary: Captures the request and response schema assumptions for Open-Meteo ensemble forecasts used in weather probability modeling.

notes.title: Weather Features Schema
notes.summary: Defines the first weather feature contract for ensemble-based Kalshi probability modeling.

notes.title: Kalshi Weather Market Mapping
notes.summary: Maps city-level weather contracts to station IDs, settlement sources, and strike interpretation rules.

notes.title: Weather Market Research
notes.summary: Consolidates the first-pass research questions and implementation assumptions for the Weather Oracle.

notes.title: NWS Settlement Rules
notes.summary: Defines the official NWS settlement sources, station IDs, and publication timing assumptions for Kalshi weather markets.
